sections.sectionTitle: Nungzuite in Sabbath ni-in Mangbuhvui Zut

verses.text: Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesuh leh a nungzuite a pai uh hi. A nungzuite in mangbuhvuite zut uh a, a khutsung uhah nuai-in a ne uh hi
Amaute lakah a om Farisi mite pawlkhat in, “Sabbath ni-in i hih dingin a kilawmlo gamtatna bang hangin gamta na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “David leh a kikholhpihte a gilkial laitakun David' gamtatna thu sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam
Pasian' innsungah amah lut a, siampite lobuang midangte' nekding a hilo Ompihna Anlum la-in ne a, ama kikholhpihte zong a nesak hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a Ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi.
Sabbath a ni dang khatin kikhopna inn khatah Jesuh pai-in thu a hilh hi. A khut taklam a zaw mi khat tua lai-ah na om hi
Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite pawlkhat in Jesuh a mawhsak theihna ding uh thu zongnuam uh ahih manin, Sabbath ni-in hih mipa a damsak hiam, ci-in na encik gige uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau' ngaihsutna thei ahih manin a khutzaw mipa kiangah, “Ding in la, mihonte mai hih lai munah hong pai in,” a ci hi. A mipa zong hong pai-in mihon mai-ah a hong ding hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note tungah thu khat kong dong nuam hi. Sabbath ni-in a pha bawlding leh a sia bawlding koi kilawmzaw a, mi khat' nuntakna suahtaksak ding leh siatsak ding koi hoihzaw ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Amaute khempeuh a et kawikawi khit ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. Amah in zong a khut zan a, a ngeina bangin a khut hong damkik hi
Ahi zongin amaute heh mahmah uh a, Jesuh a suktheihna ding uh khatlekhat a kikumpah uh hi.
Ni khat, thungen dingin mualtungah Jesuh pai a, zan tawntung Pasian kiangah thu ngenin a om hi
Khua a vak ciangin a nungzuite sam a, amaute sung panin sawmlenih teelkhia-in sawltakte ci-in min a phuak hi
Tuate in: Simon (Peter ci-in min a phuahpa) leh a naupa Andru, James leh a nau Johan, Filip, Bartholomew
Matthai, Thomas, Alfeas' tapa James, Simon (gam khualpa
James' tapa Judas, leh Jesuh a lehhekpa Iskariot' tapa Judas ahi uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Mihonpi tungah Na Sem

verses.text: Tua mualtung panin Jesuh leh a nungzui teelte paisuk uh a, a nung a zui midang tampite tawh mun zang khatah a ding hi. Jerusalem khua leh Judea gam khempeuh leh tuipi gei-a om Taia khua leh Sidon khuapite panin a hong pai mihon tampi zong hong om uh hi
Tua mite pen ama thuhilhna a ngai ding leh a natna uh panin damna a ngahnop manun a hong pai uh ahi hi. Dawi a vei mite zong hong pai uh a, damna a ngah uh hi
Jesuh' tung panin vangliatna paikhia-in mi khempeuh damsak ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah lawn' ding a hanciam uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite en a, “No mizawngte Pasian' Ukna sungah om na hih manun thupha ngah mi na hi uh hi
Tuhunin a gilkial note nidang ciangin na gil uh a vah ding hi. Tuhunin a dah note nidang ciangin na nuam ding uh hi
“Mihing Tapa' hangin mite in hong mudahin hong tuamkoih a, hong simmawhin migiloin hong seh ciangin thupha ngah na hi uh hi
Vantungah na thaman ding uh lian mahmah ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin lungdamin na diang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsangte tungah a bawl uh hi
“Ahi zongin tuhunin a hau note in nopsakna ngahkhin na hih manun gimna na thuak ding uh hi
Tuhunin a gilvah note in gilkial gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Tuhunin a lungdam note dahin na kap ding uh hi
“Mi khempeuh in note hong pahtakbawl ciangin gimna a thuakding na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsang zuaute a pahtakbawl uh hi.
“Ahi zongin ka thugen a za note kiangah kong cihin-ah: Na galte uh na it un la, no hong mudah mite tungah a pha na bawl un
No hong phuisamte thupha na pia un la, no hong bawlsiate-a' ding thu na ngetsak un
Na paang langkhat a hong bengte, a langkhat zong na dawhlai un. Na puantungsilh uh a hong sutte tungah, na puansungsilh uh zong na piathuah lai un
A hong ngente peuhmah na pia un la, na na uh a hong laksakte tung panin lakik kei un
Note tungah a hong kibawl ding na deih uh bangin midangte tungah na bawl un
“No hong itte bek it le uh cin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhnei mite nangawn in amau a itte a it uh hi
No tungah a hoihin a hong gamtate tung bekah a hoihin gamta le uh cin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn tua bangmahin gamta uh hi
Ngahkik ding na lametna uh mite tung bekah leitawi na piak uh leh bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn in zong a piakzah mah uh a ngahkik dingin khatlekhat kileitawi uh hi

Tua bang lelin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Na galte uh itin amaute tungah thupha bawl un la, lohkik ding lamen loin leitawi pia un. Tua hi leh na thaman uh lian ding a, a Lianpen Pasian' tate na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lungdamna mel a thei theilo mite leh a huaiham mite tungah amah migi hi
Tua ahih manin na Pa un hehpihna a neih bangin note in zong hehpihna lungsim nei ta un.

“Midangte' thu khen kei un. Tua hi leh no tungah zong Pasian in thu hong khenlo ding hi. Midangte mawhsak kei un. Tua hi leh Pasian in note zong hong mawhsaklo ding hi. Midangte' mawhna maisak un. Tua hi leh Pasian in note' mawhna zong hong maisak ding hi

Midangte tungah pia un. Tua hi leh Pasian in note tungah zong hong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte na piakna uh tawh kizui-in a henhen, a tahtah, a dimletin Pasian in note tungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat zong gen a, “Mittaw khat in mittaw dang khat lam paipih theilo hi. Paipih zenzen leh a nih tuakun hawkguamah kiakhawm ding uh hi
Sang naupang khat a siapa sangin lianzaw ngeilo hi; a sin ding khempeuh a theihkhit ciangin a siapa tawh kikim pan bek ding hi
“Bang hangin na mit sungah singluang a tang phawkkha loin na lawmte' mit sunga ninthem tang etsak na hi hiam

Na mit sunga singluang hong tang nangawn mulo napi-in, ‘Lawm aw, na mit sunga ninthem tang hong lakkhiatsak ning,’ ci-in na lawmte kiangah bangci gentheih ding na hi hiam? No a kineihkhemte aw, na mit sung uha singluang tang lakhia masa le uh cin, na lawmte uh mit sunga ninthem tang mu-in na lakhia thei pan ding uh hi.”
“A cidam singkung in gah ginalo gah ngeilo a, a ginalo singkung in gah limci gah ngeilo hi
Singkung khempeuh a gah tawh kithei thei hi. Sialtalling kung panin theigah kilo ngeilo a, lingvom kung panin leenggah kilo ngeilo hi

Mihoihpa in a lungsim sunga thuhoih omteng hong suahkhia a, migilopa in a lungsim sunga a gitlohna teng hong suahkhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen amau' lungsim sunga a om bangbang a hong paukhia uh ahi hi.
“Bang hangin, ‘Topa aw, Topa aw,’ hong ci napi-in ka hong gente zuilo na hi uh hiam
Ka kiangah hong pai a, ka thuhilhna za-in a zuite khempeuh pen kua tawh kibang hiam cih leh
suang tungah inn lamin, a khuamkua ding suangsung thukpi tak to-in a phutpa tawh kibang hi. Tui a khan' ciangin tui in tua inn a nawk hangin limtakin kilam ahih manin susia zolo hi

Ahi zongin ka thuhilhna za napi-in a zuilote pen bulkip a neilo, leilak mawkmawkah inn a lampa tawh kibang hi. Tuikhang in tua inn a nawk ciangin thakhat thu-in siagawppah a, tua inn pen naksiat mahmah hi,” a ci hi.
